stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 14, how is a runway defined?

options.a: A rectangular area on a land aerodrome prepared for the landing and take-off of helicopters.
options.b: A rectangular area on a land aerodrome prepared for landing and take-off of aircraft.
options.c: A round area on an aerodrome prepared for landing and take-off of aircraft.
options.d: A rectangular area on a land or water aerodrome prepared for landing and take-off of aircraft.
